rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (issue 1 and 6).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (introducing a circular argument in the Results section).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
